title: phyllanthus tenuirhachis
intro: Phyllanthus tenuirhachis, also known as the 'Slender Rhachis Phyllanthus', is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China and Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving liver function. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus tenuirhachis is often used in teas, decoctions, and extracts, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
